requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality (Austria)
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC、无线模块及电能质量（奥地利）
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC、無線模組及電能品質（奧地利）

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Austria should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, public-sector project, APG / E-Control-linked programme, fleet operator, or commercial site requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards, with EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU applying. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional RED (2014/53/EU) requirements and Austrian spectrum/communications regulatory authority checks. OVE electrotechnical rules may impose additional EMC or power-quality requirements for Austrian installations. German-language documentation is commonly expected.
summary.zh: 在奥地利，若充电点运营商、公共部门项目、APG/E-Control相关计划、车队运营方或商业场址要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致，适用EU EMC指令2014/30/EU。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能触发额外的RED（2014/53/EU）要求及奥地利频谱/通信监管机构检查。OVE电工技术规则可能对奥地利安装提出额外EMC或电能质量要求。通常须提供德语文件。
summary.zht: 在奧地利，若充電點運營商、公共部門項目、APG/E-Control相關計劃、車隊運營方或商業場址要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質標準一致，適用EU EMC指令2014/30/EU。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能觸發額外的RED（2014/53/EU）要求及奧地利頻譜/通訊監管機構檢查。OVE電工技術規則可能對奧地利安裝提出額外EMC或電能品質要求。通常須提供德語文件。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — for radio module equipped chargers
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) EMC and power-quality guidelines for Austria
Austrian spectrum / communications regulatory authority requirements for radio modules where in scope

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Austrian operators, roaming, language (German), currency, and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为奥地利运营商、漫游、语言（德语）、货币和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為奧地利運營商、漫遊、語言（德語）、貨幣和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path (RED compliance where applicable), and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Austrian configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. OVE EMC and power-quality requirements must be verified for Austrian sites. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific Austrian DSO supply point. German-language interface and documentation are expected by Austrian operators.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终奥地利配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径（适用时的RED合规）以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。须核实奥地利场址的OVE EMC和电能质量要求。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体奥地利DSO供电点进行审查。奥地利运营商期望德语界面和文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終奧地利配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（適用時的RED合規）以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。須核實奧地利場址的OVE EMC和電能品質要求。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體奧地利DSO供電點進行審查。奧地利運營商期望德語介面和文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking under EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU; RED applies where radio modules are present; OCPP interoperability and OVE requirements are project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Austria
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Austrian networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality (per EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and OVE rules), RED compliance for radio modules, and Austrian communications-module requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. German-language operator interfaces and documentation are expected.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 奥地利联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量（依据EU EMC指令2014/30/EU及OVE规则）、无线模块RED合规，以及奥地利通信模块要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。奥地利运营商期望德语操作界面和文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奧地利聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質（依據EU EMC指令2014/30/EU及OVE規則）、無線模組RED合規，以及奧地利通訊模組要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。奧地利運營商期望德語操作介面和文件。
